tasks.description: Initialize a Vite Vanilla JS project (`npm create vite@latest frontend -- --template vanilla`).
Set up Firebase initialization in `src/lib/firebase.js` (export auth, db, storage).

Create `firestore.rules` at the root of the project. Implement the exact read/write constraints defined in `design.md` (no client writes, users can read their own role, authenticated users can read `processed_docs`).

Create `storage.rules` at the root of the project. Implement the cross-service check using `firestore.get()` to ensure only users with the `admin` role in Firestore can write to the storage bucket. Restrict payload size.
Create `src/components/rw-app.js`. Implement Firebase `onAuthStateChanged` logic. **(Rule: Light DOM only)**.
Create `src/components/rw-auth.js` for login UI with Tailwind. **(Rule: Light DOM only)**.
Implement role fetching in `rw-app.js`: upon login, fetch `user_roles/{uid}` and store the role state.
Implement `onSnapshot` listener on `processed_docs` collection to display RAG-ready Markdown files.
Add basic GSAP stagger animations on list load.
Implement UI (Tailwind) and Drag & Drop event listeners bound in `connectedCallback`.
Animate progress bar width using GSAP based on upload snapshot.
Ensure `<rw-app>` conditionally renders `<rw-uploader>` ONLY if the user has the `admin` role.

instruction:
Read context files, work through pending tasks, mark complete as you go.
Pause if you hit blockers or need clarification.
